summary: VoiceTextarea component (browser-based Speech-to-Text using Whisper) integration verified. All 6 components correctly import VoiceTextarea. Frontend builds successfully. Mic button has data-testid='voice-input-btn'. Browser automation blocked by environment crashes (known issue from iterations 42-48).

integration_issues.issue: Browser target crashes after login - prevents UI screenshots/interaction testing
integration_issues.notes: Known environment issue from iterations 42-48. Login works correctly. Not a code issue.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: VoiceTextarea.js - Exports VoiceInputButton and VoiceTextarea, data-testid='voice-input-btn' on line 150
VERIFIED: VoiceTextarea uses React.forwardRef to pass refs to underlying Textarea
VERIFIED: Mic button only shows when textarea is NOT disabled (line 190-196)
VERIFIED: Singleton pattern for Whisper pipeline with lazy loading (lines 6-34)
VERIFIED: SessionNotes.js line 7 - import { VoiceTextarea as Textarea }
VERIFIED: CaseHistoryForm.js line 7 - import { VoiceTextarea as Textarea }
VERIFIED: ClientManagement.js line 10 - import { VoiceTextarea as Textarea }
VERIFIED: Assessments.js line 8 - import { VoiceTextarea as Textarea }
VERIFIED: ClientProfileView.js line 9 - import { VoiceTextarea as Textarea }
VERIFIED: SessionCheckInOut.js line 8 - import { VoiceTextarea as Textarea }
VERIFIED: Frontend builds successfully with no errors (only React hook warnings)

success_rate.frontend: Code review 100% - UI testing blocked by browser crashes

context_for_next_testing_agent: VoiceTextarea component is a drop-in replacement for shadcn Textarea. All 6 components (SessionNotes, CaseHistoryForm, ClientManagement, Assessments, ClientProfileView, SessionCheckInOut) correctly import it. Mic button appears in bottom-right corner of textareas. Browser automation crashes after login - known environment issue.

VoiceTextarea component.details: Wraps Textarea with mic button (data-testid='voice-input-btn'), lazy-loads Whisper model on first click

browser_automation_results.dashboard_render: BLOCKED - Browser target crashes (known environment issue)
